# openrouter_api_key (Resource)

Manages an OpenRouter API key. The one-time plaintext key returned by OpenRouter on create is deliberately discarded and never stored in Terraform state.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "openrouter_api_key" "example" {
  name                  = "Example Terraform Key"
  workspace_id          = openrouter_workspace.example.id
  limit                 = 25
  limit_reset           = "monthly"
  include_byok_in_limit = true
  disabled              = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) API key display name.

### Optional

- `disabled` (Boolean) Whether the key is disabled.
- `expires_at` (String) Optional UTC expiration timestamp.
- `include_byok_in_limit` (Boolean) Whether BYOK usage counts against the key limit.
- `limit` (Number) Optional spending limit in USD.
- `limit_reset` (String) Limit reset interval (`daily`, `weekly`, `monthly`) or null for no reset.
- `workspace_id` (String) Optional workspace ID for APIs/accounts that support workspace-scoped key creation.

### Read-Only

- `byok_usage` (Number) Total BYOK usage returned by OpenRouter.
- `byok_usage_daily` (Number) Daily BYOK usage returned by OpenRouter.
- `byok_usage_monthly` (Number) Monthly BYOK usage returned by OpenRouter.
- `byok_usage_weekly` (Number) Weekly BYOK usage returned by OpenRouter.
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp returned by OpenRouter.
- `creator_user_id` (String) Creator user ID returned by OpenRouter.
- `hash` (String) Stable OpenRouter API key hash/identifier.
- `id` (String) Stable API key identifier. Same value as `hash`.
- `label` (String) OpenRouter label for the key.
- `limit_remaining` (Number) Remaining limit returned by OpenRouter.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp returned by OpenRouter.
- `usage` (Number) Total usage returned by OpenRouter.
- `usage_daily` (Number) Daily usage returned by OpenRouter.
- `usage_monthly` (Number) Monthly usage returned by OpenRouter.
- `usage_weekly` (Number) Weekly usage returned by OpenRouter.
